summary: A highly praised show labeled a 'certified killer' despite no details on recording source or sound quality.
review: The sole reviewer gave the recording four stars and enthusiastically called it a certified killer, indicating strong enjoyment of the performance. No specific comments were made about the audio source, mix, or individual songs.

ai_rating.rationale: Single positive 4‑star review suggests a good show; lack of technical detail limits confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer did not discuss set structure or pacing.
